name: compliance: --emit-traceability writes rule_id → {source_id, control_ids[]} for every rule with controls
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --emit-traceability "$PWD/TRACE.yaml" >/dev/null 2>&1 && grep -E '^r1:' TRACE.yaml 1>&2 && grep -E '  source_id: src-1' TRACE.yaml 1>&2 && grep -E '    - "PCI-DSS:6.5.1"' TRACE.yaml 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
mkdir -p tree && printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: A
  authoritative_url: https://a.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules:
  - id: r1
    name: r1
    description: x
    detector: x
    controls:
      - {framework: PCI-DSS, id: "6.5.1", title: x, url: https://x.com}
' > tree/a.yaml
